title: polypogon elongatus
intro: Polypogon elongatus, also known as tall grass or door grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Polypogon elongatus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as an infusion or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
